attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCXDDHS.RECORD_NUMBER AS BK_RECORD_NUM_INT,
SCXDDHS.Run_Number AS BK_RUN_NUM,
SCXDDHS.Shipment_Number  AS Shipment_Number,
SCXDDHS.Shipment_Date AS SHIPMENT_DT,
COALESCE(SHIPPER.SHIPPER_SERVICETYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPPER_SUPPLIER_TYPE,
COALESCE(CONSIGNEE.CONSIGNEE_SERVICETYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CONSIGNEE_SUPPLIER_TYPE,
'USD'   AS TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
SCXDDHS.PIECES as SHIPMENT_PIECE_CNT,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.LEG,'UNK') as SUPPLY_CHAIN_LEG_TYPE_CD,
SCXDDHS.FUEL_AMOUNT as SHIPMENT_FUEL_TRX_COST_AMT,
SCXDDHS.ALL_OTHER_ACCESSORIAL as ALL_OTHR_ACSRL_TRX_COST_AMT,
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_AMOUNT as FREIGHT_TRX_COST_AMT,
SCXDDHS.PAID_AMOUNT as PAID_TRX_COST_AMT,
SCXDDHS.ACTUAL_WEIGHT as ACTUAL_WEIGHT_KG_QTY,
SCXDDHS.BILLED_WEIGHT as BILLED_WEIGHT_KG_QTY,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.SHIPPER_COMPANY,'UNKNOWN') as SHIPPER_COMPANY_NAME,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.MODE_DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') as TRANSPORT_MODE_CD, 
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Shipper_City,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPPER_CITY_NAME,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Shipper_Postal_Code,'UNKNOWN') AS SHIPPER_POSTAL_CD ,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Shipper_State_Province,'UNKNOWN')  AS SHIPPER_STATE_OR_PROVINCE_NAME,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.SHIPPER_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   AS SHIPPER_COUNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.CONSIGNEE_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNKNOWN')   AS CONSIGNEE_COUNTRY_CD,      
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.SHIPPER_PORT_CODE,'UNK') as SHIPPER_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,
COALESCE (SCXDDHS.CONSIGNEE_PORT_CODE,'UNK') as CONSIGNEE_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Consignee_City,'UNKNOWN') AS CONSIGNEE_CITY_NAME,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Consignee_Postal_Code,'UNKNOWN') AS CONSIGNEE_POSTAL_CD ,
COALESCE(SCXDDHS.Consignee_State_Province,'UNKNOWN')  AS CONSIGNEE_STATE_OR_PRVNC_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WEEKLY_RUN SCXDDHS
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SHIPPER_DET SHIPPER
ON SCXDDHS.RECORD_NUMBER=SHIPPER.RECORD_NUMBER
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CONSIGNEE_DET CONSIGNEE
ON SCXDDHS.RECORD_NUMBER=CONSIGNEE.RECORD_NUMBER
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SC_FREIGHT_SHIPMENT NSFS
WHERE NSFS.BK_RECORD_NUM_INT=SCXDDHS.RECORD_NUMBER
AND NSFS.BK_RUN_NUM=SCXDDHS.RUN_NUMBER)
